title: PlayerHeadDrops
description: Drops the player's head with their skin on death. Configurable drop chance, one-time drops, PvP-only mode, inventory delivery, and custom head name styling.
body:
# 💀 PlayerHeadDrops ![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/version-1.0.0-1E90FF?style=for-the-badge) ![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-26.1.x-4C9A2A?style=for-the-badge) ![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-Paper%20%7C%20Purpur-FF6B35?style=for-the-badge) ![Java](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-25%2B-ED8B00?style=for-the-badge&logo=openjdk&logoColor=white) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/playerheaddrops?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&color=00AF5C&label=downloads)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/playerheaddrops) ![Side](https://img.shields.io/badge/side-server-9B4DCA?style=for-the-badge) [![Telegram](https://img.shields.io/badge/Telegram-channel-26A5E4?style=for-the-badge&logo=telegram&logoColor=white)](https://t.me/pro100chnl)
> **When a player dies, their head drops — complete with their skin.** > Simple, lightweight, and highly configurable. --- ## ✨ Features - 🎭 **Skin-accurate heads** — Uses embedded texture data so the skin is preserved even after server restarts - 🎲 **Configurable drop chance** — From 0% to 100%, or anything in between - 🔒 **One-time drop mode** — A player's head can only drop once, ever. Data persists across restarts - ⚔️ **PvP-only mode** — Heads drop only when a player is killed by another player - 🎒 **Drop to inventory** — Send the head directly to the killer's inventory instead of the ground - 📢 **Server-wide announcements** — Broadcast a custom message when a head drops (supports color codes) - 🖊️ **Fully customizable head name** — Change format, color, and italic style from the config --- ## 🎥 Demo
--- ## ⚙️ Configuration
📁 config.yml ```yaml drop-chance: 1.0 one-time-drop: false only-pvp: false drop-to-inventory: false announce-drop: false announce-message: "&e☠ %player%'s head has dropped!" head: name-format: "%player%'s Head" name-color: yellow name-italic: false ```
--- ## 📋 Compatibility | | | |:---:|:---:| | **Server software** | Paper / Purpur | | **Minecraft version** | 1.21+ | | **Java** | 21+ | --- ## 🚀 Installation 1. Download the latest `.jar` from the files tab 2. Place it in your server's `plugins/` folder 3. Restart the server 4. Edit `config.yml` to your liking 5. Restart again to apply changes --- ## ❓ FAQ
Do heads survive server restarts? Yes — the plugin uses embedded texture data, so skins are preserved forever.
Does it work with keepInventory? Yes — the drop logic is independent of vanilla gamerules.
Can I change the head name? Yes — fully customizable in config.yml (format, color, italic).
--- ## 🔗 Links
